query:
SELECT
    latitude,
    longitude,
    mmsi AS "mmsi!: Mmsi",
    TIMESTAMP AS msgtime,
    course_over_ground,
    navigation_status_id AS "navigational_status: NavigationStatus",
    rate_of_turn,
    speed_over_ground,
    true_heading,
    distance_to_shore,
    NULL AS "active_gear: Gear"
FROM
    ais_positions
WHERE
    mmsi = $1
    AND TIMESTAMP BETWEEN $2 AND $3
    AND $1 IN (
        SELECT
            mmsi
        FROM
            all_vessels
        WHERE
            mmsi = $1
            AND CASE
                WHEN $4 = 0 THEN TRUE
                WHEN $4 = 1 THEN (
                    length >= $5
                    AND (
                        ship_type IS NOT NULL
                        AND NOT (ship_type = ANY ($6::INT[]))
                        OR length > $7
                    )
                )
            END
    )
ORDER BY
    TIMESTAMP ASC
